Not And Not Of Mot To Strike Entire Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LOUISE C. O'DONNELL Motion To Strike Entire Complaint:
APPEAR: Thomas Best, Esq. 956-7654 opposing party & prior atty for Randall Loveland and Tia Russell; Caroline E. Gegg, Esq. 925/686-0232 specially appearing for A. Nick Shamiyeh, Esq. 925/935-9401 for deft & moving party.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED). (302/AJR/ju) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Motion In Support Of Monetary & Nonmonetary Sanctions Against Randall Loveland, Tia Russell & Thomas Best
Off Calendar Oct-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LOUISE C. O'DONNELL Motion For Sanctions Against Randall Loveland, Tia Russell & Thomas Best:
APPEAR: Thomas Best, Esq. 956-7654 opposing party & prior atty for Randall Loveland and Tia Russell; Caroline E. Gegg, Esq. 925/686-0232 specially appearing for A. Nick Shamiyeh, Esq. 925/935-9401 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Motion for sanctions denied as to Attorney Thomas Best and granted as to the clients (Randall Loveland and Tia Russell) in the amount of $6,000.00 plus costs, to be paid in 30 days. Complaint dismissed with prejudice. Mr. Best's order signed in open court. Deft to prepare order as to remainder. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT). Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/ju) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
